non_derivative_transactions.security_title: Common Stock, Par Value $0.01 Per Share
non_derivative_transactions.nature_of_ownership: The Janet K. Cooper 2012 Trust, David K. Cooper, trustee
non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: The reporting owner acquired 3820.0 shares of Common Stock, Par Value $0.01 Per Share at $0.0 (Code J).

footnotes.1: On February 8, 2021, the reporting person transferred 1,481 shares of LII common stock (the "Transfer") from the reporting person's brokerage account to The Janet K. Cooper 2012 Trust (David K. Cooper, trustee) (the "Trust").  Additionally, on February 8, 2021, the reporting person exchanged 2,339 shares of LII common stock from the reporting person's brokerage account with cash in the Trust (the "Exchange of Assets") in an amount equivalent to the closing price of the shares on February 5, 2021.  The Transfer and Exchange of Assets resulted in a decrease in the number of shares the reporting person owns directly and a corresponding increase in the number of shares the reporting person beneficially indirectly owns through the Trust. The reporting person believes that the Transfer and Exchange of Assets constitutes a change in form of beneficial ownership of the shares, exempted by Rule 16a-13 under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.

signatures.signature_name: /s/ Sarah Braley, attorney-in-fact for Ms. Janet Katherine Cooper
